title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
We at Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Radiologist based out of Bengaluru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies:
Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies!
